_doc: === PINNED FACT: A continuity fact (W4). Either an entity property OR a narrative-wide rule. ===
_id: OPTIONAL. UUIDv7. Auto-generated on import if null/missing.
_narrative_id: REQUIRED. The narrative this fact belongs to. Rewritten on import to match the imported narrative slug.
_entity_id: OPTIONAL. UUID of the entity this fact attaches to. NULL = narrative-wide fact (e.g. world-building rule). Remapped during import if the entity ID was reassigned.
_key: REQUIRED. Key within the entity's properties, OR a freeform label for narrative-wide facts. Examples: "age", "hair_color", "magic_rule", "commitment".
_value: REQUIRED. Canonical value. Stored as string for simplicity; LLM prompts include it verbatim during continuity checks.
_note: OPTIONAL. Writer-supplied rationale or exception note.

_doc: === Commitment example — output of /tensa-narrative-llm <nid> commitments. Narrative-wide (entity_id=null), key="commitment" ===
value: Volkov's pistol introduced in scene 1 must fire by scene 9
note: skill:tensa-narrative-llm — Chekhov's gun. Status: pending payoff.
